name: trigger-on-cleanup-phrase
expected_behavior: Invokes the repo-cleanup skill (not git-ship, not silent-failure-hunt)
Runs git status and git branch / git worktree list before proposing any deletion
Categorizes untracked files into junk / commit-worthy / PII
Waits for explicit user approval before deleting junk or staging commits
Uses git cherry + main-log grep when checking remote branches with ahead-of-main commits
_notes: Mirror of the real session that prompted this skill. Validates the primary trigger phrase and the three-phase gated workflow.
